name: Rhubarb-Strawberry Fruit Leather
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup strawberry puree (fresh, frozen, or frozen with sugar)
1 tablespoon honey, unless using frozen strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rhubarb puree and strawberry puree in a bowl.
2. If using strawberries that have already had sugar added, include the pre-sweetened strawberries directly into the mixture.
3. Spread the combined mixture onto plastic wrap.
4. Dry the mixture as you would for fruit leather until it reaches the desired consistency.
